gram_worthy_spots.name: St. Stephen's Cathedral
gram_worthy_spots.description: Vienna's iconic Gothic cathedral with stunning architecture that's especially beautiful during the Christmas season. A must-see landmark for photography and exploring Vienna's historic center.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Upper Belvedere Palace
gram_worthy_spots.description: A grand baroque palace offering impressive views and renowned art collections. Perfect for both cultural exploration and photogenic palace grounds.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Vienna City Hall with Christmas Market
gram_worthy_spots.description: The beautiful city hall building combined with the festive Christmas market creates a picturesque scene perfect for capturing Vienna's holiday atmosphere. Popular gathering spot with holiday decorations.

gram_worthy_spots.name: am Hof Christmas Market
gram_worthy_spots.description: A charming Christmas market in Vienna's historic am Hof square, offering traditional holiday ambiance and festive photo opportunities. One of Vienna's popular seasonal attractions.
